title: Fit a Hierarchical Bayes mixture model and write exports in one call
summary: Combines `fit` and `finalize` into a single command: runs Metropolis-Hastings MCMC to estimate the HB model, then immediately writes the user-facing summary and CSV exports. Emits a single started / finished event pair.
description: Reads a coded long-format choice CSV and fits a Hierarchical Bayes mixture model by Metropolis-Hastings MCMC, then immediately finalises the run and writes the user-facing artifacts — segment means, mixture probabilities, per-respondent point estimates — all in one protocol invocation. Equivalent to calling `fit` then `finalize` back-to-back, but with a single started / finished event pair instead of two. The raw chain is persisted exactly as it would be from a standalone `fit` call, so you can still run `finalize` or `fit-extend` later if needed.
usage:
[["model-mnl-hb-mh::fit-finalize"]]
input = "<coded_long.csv>"
run_dir = "<dir>"
run_name = "hbmh_run"
# optional:
segments = 2
iterations = 10000
burnin = 0.2
threads = 4
random_seed = 0
attribute_signs = [{ name = "price", rule = "non_pos" }]

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Path to the coded long-format CSV file. Expected layout: one row per (respondent, task, alternative), with a `resp_id` column, a `task` column, a response column, and one numeric column per coded covariate.

arguments.name: run_dir
arguments.description: Output directory for results. Created if it does not exist. Receives the persisted chain, `spec.json`, bookkeeping postcards, and the `exports/` subdirectory.

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

arguments.name: test_input
arguments.description: Optional holdout CSV for out-of-sample evaluation.

arguments.name: covariate_input
arguments.description: Optional respondent-level covariate CSV: a `resp_id` column plus one numeric column per covariate.

arguments.name: export_dir
arguments.description: Where to write the CSV exports. Defaults to `{run_dir}/exports`.

arguments.name: segments
arguments.description: Number of mixture components in the population-level normal mixture. Default `2`. Use `segments = 1` for standard single-population HB.

arguments.name: iterations
arguments.description: Total MCMC iterations to run. Default `10000`.

arguments.name: save_every
arguments.description: Save draws every N iterations. Default `10`.

arguments.name: threads
arguments.description: Number of threads for per-respondent likelihood evaluations. Default `4`.

arguments.name: chains
arguments.description: Number of independent MCMC chains to run in parallel. Default `1`. Each chain uses a seed derived from `random_seed` and its chain index. Draws are pooled at finalize time.

arguments.name: report_thin
arguments.description: Convergence-report snapshot interval in saved draws. Default `0` (same as `checkpoint_every`). Controls how many data points appear in the convergence chart.

arguments.name: burnin
arguments.description: Burnin fraction discarded from the saved draws when computing the summary. Default `0.2` (discard the first 20% of saved draws).

arguments.name: attribute_signs
arguments.description: Sign constraints on individual attributes, formatted as `{ name, rule }` objects where `rule` is `"non_neg"` or `"non_pos"`.

details:
`fit-finalize` is the single-call entry point for HB estimation. It runs the MH MCMC sampler as `fit` would, then immediately calls the same finalization logic as `finalize` — all within a single protocol event pair. The raw chain is persisted to `run_dir`, so you can still run `fit-extend` to add more iterations or `finalize` to change the burnin without re-running the chain.

See `fit` for the full list of advanced sampler parameters (`amu`, `nu_inc`, `step_size`, `init_ridge`, etc.).
value:
On success, `run_dir` contains the full chain state plus `exports/` with:

- `summary.json` — segment means, mixture probabilities, log-likelihood.
- `{run_id}_point_estimates.csv` — per-respondent posterior-mean attribute coefficients.

In protocol mode the plugin emits a single `event.run.started`, then `event.run.finished` (or `event.run.failed`) carrying the final fit summary.
notes: Equivalent to calling `fit` then `finalize` back-to-back with the same `run_dir`.
The chain is fully persisted — you can still `fit-extend` or re-`finalize` with a different burnin afterward.

see_also.description: Fit only — call `finalize` separately when needed.
Re-summarise a completed run with a different burnin.
Add more iterations to an existing chain before finalizing.
Cross-validated fit and finalize in one call.
Latent class counterpart — assigns respondents to a single class.
Produces the coded long-format CSV that this command consumes.

examples.title: Basic 1-segment HB fit-finalize
examples.body:
[["model-mnl-hb-mh::fit-finalize"]]
input = "./estimation/coded_long.csv"
run_dir = "./runs/hb"
run_name = "hbmh_run1"
segments = 1
iterations = 10000
burnin = 0.2

examples.title: 2-segment HB fit-finalize with holdout
examples.body:
[["model-mnl-hb-mh::fit-finalize"]]
input = "./estimation/coded_long.csv"
test_input = "./estimation/coded_long_holdout.csv"
run_dir = "./runs/hb-k2"
run_name = "hbmh_run2"
segments = 2
iterations = 20000
threads = 4
burnin = 0.2

examples.title: HB fit-finalize with price sign constraint
examples.body:
[["model-mnl-hb-mh::fit-finalize"]]
input = "./estimation/coded_long.csv"
run_dir = "./runs/hb-constrained"
run_name = "hbmh_run3"
segments = 1
iterations = 10000
burnin = 0.2
attribute_signs = [{ name = "price", rule = "non_pos" }]

fields.name: input
fields.description: Path to the coded-long-format CSV file.

fields.name: run_dir
fields.description: Output directory for results. Created if it does not exist.

fields.name: run_name
fields.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

fields.name: test_input
fields.description: Optional holdout CSV for out-of-sample evaluation.

fields.name: export_dir
fields.description: Where to write CSV exports. Defaults to {run_dir}/exports.

fields.name: save_every
fields.description: Save draws every N iterations. Default: 10.

fields.name: chains
fields.description: Number of independent MCMC chains. Default: 1.

fields.name: report_thin
fields.description: Snapshot every N saved draws (0 = checkpoint_every). Default: 0.

fields.name: burnin
fields.description: Burnin fraction discarded when computing summaries. Default: 0.2.

fields.name: attribute_signs
fields.description: Sign constraints: [{name, rule}] where rule is non_neg or non_pos.
